channel.title: Proofpoint Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Proofpoint Inc. (proofpoint).

item.title: CVE-2025-8558 · 2.3 LOW
item.description: Insider Threat Management (ITM) Server versions prior to 7.17.2 contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows unauthenticated users on an adjacent network to perform agent unregistration when the number of registered agents exceeds the l…

item.title: CVE-2024-10635 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Enterprise Protection S/MIME Opaque Signature Attachment Scanning Bypass
item.description: Enterprise Protection contains an improper input validation vulnerability in attachment defense that allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to bypass attachment scanning security policy by sending a malicious S/MIME attachment with an opaque signa…

item.title: CVE-2025-0431 · 5.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Enterprise Protection Backslash URL Rewrite Bypass
item.description: Enterprise Protection contains a vulnerability in URL rewriting that allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to send an email which bypasses URL protections impacting the integrity of recipient's email. This occurs due to improper filtering of back…

item.title: CVE-2024-3676 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: The Proofpoint Encryption endpoint of Proofpoint Enterprise Protection contains an Improper Input Validation vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated remote attacker with a specially crafted HTTP request to create additional Encryption user accou…

item.title: CVE-2024-0862 · 5 MEDIUM
item.description: The Proofpoint Encryption endpoint of Proofpoint Enterprise Protection contains a Server-Side Request Forgery vulnerability that allows an authenticated user to relay HTTP requests from the Protection server to otherwise private network addresses.

item.title: CVE-2023-5770 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — HTML injection in email body through email subject
item.description: Proofpoint Enterprise Protection contains a vulnerability in the email delivery agent that allows an unauthenticated attacker to inject improperly encoded HTML into the email body of a message through the email subject. The vulnerability is caused by…

item.title: CVE-2023-5771 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — HTML injection in AdminUI through email subject
item.description: Proofpoint Enterprise Protection contains a stored XSS vulnerability in the AdminUI. An unauthenticated attacker can send a specially crafted email with HTML in the subject which triggers XSS when viewing quarantined messages. This issue affects Proo…

item.title: CVE-2023-4828 · 6.4 MEDIUM — ITM Server Communications Hijack
item.description: An improper check for an exceptional condition in the Insider Threat Management (ITM) Server could be used by an attacker to change the server's configuration of any already-registered agent so that the agent sends all future communications to an att…

item.title: CVE-2023-4803 · 4.8 MEDIUM — ITM Server Cross-site Scripting in WriteWindowTitle Endpoint
item.description: A reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in the WriteWindowTitle endpoint of the Insider Threat Management (ITM) Server's web console could be used by an authenticated administrator to run arbitrary javascript within another web console adminis…

item.title: CVE-2023-4802 · 4.8 MEDIUM — ITM Server Cross-site Scripting in UpdateInstalledSoftware Endpoint
item.description: A reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in the UpdateInstalledSoftware endpoint of the Insider Threat Management (ITM) Server's web console could be used by an authenticated administrator to run arbitrary javascript within another web console…

item.title: CVE-2023-4801 · 7.5 HIGH — ITM MacOS Agent Improper Certificate Validation
item.description: An improper certification validation vulnerability in the Insider Threat Management (ITM) Agent for MacOS could be used by an anonymous actor on an adjacent network to establish a man-in-the-middle position between the agent and the ITM server after…

item.title: CVE-2023-36002 · 4.3 MEDIUM — ITM Server Missing Authorization for URL validation
item.description: A missing authorization check in multiple URL validation endpoints of the Insider Threat Management Server enables an anonymous attacker on an adjacent network to smuggle content via DNS lookups. All versions before 7.14.3 are affected.

item.title: CVE-2023-36000 · 6.5 MEDIUM — ITM Server Missing Authorization for Agent Config
item.description: A missing authorization check in the MacOS agent configuration endpoint of the Insider Threat Management Server enables an anonymous attacker on an adjacent network to obtain sensitive information. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to firs…

item.title: CVE-2023-35998 · 4.6 MEDIUM — ITM Server Missing Authorization in SOAP Endpoints
item.description: A missing authorization check in multiple SOAP endpoints of the Insider Threat Management Server enables an attacker on an adjacent network to read and write unauthorized objects. Successful exploitation requires an attacker to first obtain a valid a…

item.title: CVE-2023-2818 · 5.5 MEDIUM — ITM Windows Agent Insecure Filesystem Permissions
item.description: An insecure filesystem permission in the Insider Threat Management Agent for Windows enables local unprivileged users to disrupt agent monitoring. All versions prior to 7.14.3 are affected. Agents for MacOS and Linux and Cloud are unaffected.

item.title: CVE-2023-2820 · 6.1 MEDIUM
item.description: An information disclosure vulnerability in the faye endpoint in Proofpoint Threat Response / Threat Response Auto-Pull (PTR/TRAP) could be used by an attacker on an adjacent network to obtain credentials to integrated services via a man-in-the-middle…

item.title: CVE-2023-2819 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Sources UI in Proofpoint Threat Response/ Threat Response Auto Pull (PTR/TRAP) could allow an authenticated administrator on an adjacent network to replace the image file with an arbitrary MIME type.…

item.title: CVE-2023-0090 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Proofpoint Enterprise Protection webservices unauthenticated RCE
item.description: The webservices in Proofpoint Enterprise Protection (PPS/POD) contain a vulnerability that allows for an anonymous user to execute remote code through 'eval injection'. Exploitation requires network access to the webservices API, but such access is a…

item.title: CVE-2023-0089 · 8.8 HIGH — Proofpoint Enterprise Protection webutils authenticated RCE
item.description: The webutils in Proofpoint Enterprise Protection (PPS/POD) contain a vulnerability that allows an authenticated user to execute remote code through 'eval injection'. This affects all versions 8.20.0 and below.

item.title: CVE-2022-46334 · 7.8 HIGH — Proofpoint Enterprise Protection Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: Proofpoint Enterprise Protection (PPS/PoD) contains a vulnerability which allows the pps user to escalate to root privileges due to unnecessary permissions. This affects all versions 8.19.0 and below.

item.title: CVE-2022-46333 · 7.2 HIGH — Proofpoint Enterprise Protection perl eval() arbitrary command execution
item.description: The admin user interface in Proofpoint Enterprise Protection (PPS/PoD) contains a command injection vulnerability that enables an admin to execute commands beyond their allowed scope. This affects all versions 8.19.0 and below.

item.title: CVE-2022-46332 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Proofpoint Enterprise Protection (PPS/PoD) XSS in "Attachment Names"
item.description: The Admin Smart Search feature in Proofpoint Enterprise Protection (PPS/PoD) contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that enables an anonymous email sender to gain admin privileges within the user interface. This affects all versions 8.1…
